title: aster polyglossus
intro: Aster polyglossus, also known as White Mountain Aster, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Aster polyglossus include its potential to reduce fever, ease menstrual cramps, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Aster polyglossus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
